title: Install tree support systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install tree support systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Read and interpret arborist plans and specifications for tree support system for specified tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and interpret arborist plans and specifications for tree support system for specified tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and interpret arborist plans and specifications for tree support system for specified tree.

pcs.text: Determine and obtain materials required for installing tree support system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and obtain materials required for installing tree support system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and obtain materials required for installing tree support system.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select tree support system tools and equipment for tree support system activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tree support system tools and equipment for tree support system activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tree support system tools and equipment for tree support system activity.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble and position tools, equipment and materials for ease of access during installation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and position tools, equipment and materials for ease of access during installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and position tools, equipment and materials for ease of access during installation.

elements.title: Prepare trees for tree support system

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess structural integrity of tree and select low-risk access method for tree support system installation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access tree safely and attain secure work positions to conduct installation.

pcs.text: Maintain inspection of tree for above-ground hazards throughout installation activities
